plugins.name: quant-research
plugins.description: Protocol skills for algorithmic trading and quantitative finance research. The notebook unit is one Purpose (a research thesis: the parent claim about the world the notebook tests, verdicted at notebook closure as supported / refuted / partial / refuted-as-stated); each `## H<id>` block inside is one experiment that tests an admissible child claim decomposing the parent thesis (admissibility requires own falsifiable claim, own stated purpose distinct from parent, and meaningful research unit — sensitivity sweeps and parameter-only follow-ons go in the robustness battery, not the hypothesis log). Schema uses `purpose_id` as the notebook-level identifier so that `experiment` is reserved for the apparatus that tests one hypothesis. Bundles two skills: (1) `quant-research` — research design with up-front headline-figure plan and reader-takeaway, time-series validation, robustness battery, and the multi-agent bug-review layer (5 specialists + 1 adversarial cold-eye reviewer with deliberately minimum context) for implementation correctness; (2) `experiment-review` — multi-agent specialist review (7 specialists + 1 adversarial cold-eye reviewer) of a Purpose notebook for research-quality and claim-warrant, orthogonal to bug review and a mandatory co-gate before verdict='supported'.
